tool_args.label: Department of Subways implements Platform Barrier Pilot

payload.description: Infrastructure, MOW Engineering and Service Delivery of NYCT Subways implemented the pilot platform barrier program
NYCT's pilot platform barrier program: safety barriers to help protect customers from falling or accessing open track areas from subway platforms. More cost-effective than platform screen doors.

tool_args.label: Service Diversions role compared to conductor

payload.claim_text: Mr. Delgado's role can be compared to that of an orchestra's conductor—whereby he must lead, organize, and synthesize many different independent parts with the goal of completing before the next act (rush hour) is scheduled to begin.
